title: Synapse Message Envelope
description: Common envelope wrapping every Synapse protocol message. The 'type' field selects the payload schema.

msg_id.description: ULID. Sortable lexically by time. No central coordinator required.

type.description: Selects the payload schema. Experimental types must use the 'x-' prefix.

version.description: Protocol version. Minor versions are additive and backward-compatible; majors require migration.

agent_id.description: Stable identifier for the emitting agent within the session.

session_id.description: Unit of multi-tenancy and isolation. All routing is scoped to a session.

task_id.description: Optional. Ties this message to a logical task within the session.

parent_msg_id.description: Optional. The msg_id of the message that caused this one. Used for replay and causality.

timestamp_ms.description: Wall-clock emission time in milliseconds since epoch. Used for display only; ULID prefix is authoritative ordering.

payload.description: Type-specific payload. Validated against the schema selected by 'type'.

tenant_id.description: Optional. Used for multi-tenant deployments. All bus keys and DB rows are scoped by this.
